summary: Manual Codex editorial review judged this issue publication-ready after a direct rewrite from the filtered candidate set.
strengths: Clear editorial through-line around verification, reliability, and institutional capacity
Markets section preserved as data-backed reference material
Weak feed artifacts, job postings, stale evergreen pages, and placeholder copy were removed

findings.issue: A few secondary items still link to publisher landing pages rather than exact article URLs.
findings.recommendation: Improve direct-link resolution in the fetch pipeline so future issues can cite article pages consistently.

findings.issue: This review artifact was produced manually because the API-based AI review layer is not configured in the local environment.
findings.recommendation: Set NEWSLETTER_AI_API_TOKEN for unattended runs so the automated AI review step can execute directly.

bias_assessment: The issue stays analytical and avoids overt ideological framing; evaluative language is tied to evidence quality and workflow implications.
recommended_action: Send or publish this issue, and keep the strengthened quality gates in place for future automated runs.
